---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Cauldron OS
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the pain point or need.

**Proposed solution**
Describe the feature you'd like to see.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other ways you've thought of solving this.

**Additional context**
Mock-ups, example blueprints, related tools, etc.

**Impact**
Who benefits from this? (solo devs, teams, enterprise, etc.)
